name: Concentration Rebalancer
description: Propose trimming positions that exceed a concentration threshold. Prevents single-stock risk from growing unchecked.
content:
# Concentration Rebalancer

## Conditions
- Any single position exceeds 15% of total portfolio value
- Position has been above threshold for at least 24 hours (avoid intraday noise)

## Action
Propose: SELL partial position to bring weight back to 12% (target below threshold with buffer).

## Risk Management
- Never sell more than 30% of the position in one action
- Check if the position has unrealized gains — flag tax implications
- If position is in a loss, suggest reviewing thesis instead of mechanical trimming

## Reasoning
Single-stock concentration above 15% introduces outsized idiosyncratic risk. Mechanical rebalancing ensures portfolio diversification stays within bounds without requiring manual monitoring.
